        <script>

                var RETRY_KEY = 'chunk_load_retry_count';

                            10
                        );
                    } catch (e) {
                        return 0;
                    }
                }

                function shouldRetry() {
                    try {
                        var ts = sessionStorage.getItem(RETRY_TS_KEY);
                        if (
                            ts &&
                            Date.now() - parseInt(ts, 10) > RETRY_WINDOW_MS
                        ) {
                            sessionStorage.removeItem(RETRY_KEY);
                            sessionStorage.removeItem(RETRY_TS_KEY);
                            return true;
                        }
                    } catch (e) {
                        /* ignore */
                    }
                    return getRetryCount() < MAX_RETRIES;
                }

                function incrementRetry() {
                    try {
                        sessionStorage.setItem(
                            RETRY_KEY,
                            String(getRetryCount() + 1)
                        );
                        sessionStorage.setItem(
                            RETRY_TS_KEY,
                            String(Date.now())
                        );
                    } catch (e) {
                        /* ignore */
                    }

                function clearCachesAndReload() {
                    incrementRetry();
                    var doReload = function () {

                    overlay.innerHTML =
                        '<style>' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:2147483647;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px;background:#FFFFFF;color:#1A1A1A;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Noto Sans JP",sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-card{width:100%;max-width:420px;text-align:center}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-logo{height:20px;width:auto;max-width:100%;margin:0 auto 40px;display:block}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-logo-fallback{font-size:18px;letter-spacing:.18em;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 40px}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-title{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.5;margin:0 0 12px}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-body{font-size:15px;line-height:1.8;margin:0 0 28px;color:#555555}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-btn{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;min-width:220px;padding:15px 32px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;font-family:inherit;color:#FFFFFF;background:#1A1A1A;border:1px solid #1A1A1A;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .2s ease}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-btn:hover{opacity:.85}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-btn:focus-visible{outline:2px solid #1A1A1A;outline-offset:3px}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-icon{width:16px;height:16px;flex:0 0 auto}' +
                        '#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-hint{font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;margin:24px 0 0;color:#999999}' +
                        '@media (max-width:480px){#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-title{font-size:18px}#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-body{font-size:14px}#chunk-error-overlay .ceo-btn{width:100%}}' +
                        '</style>' +
                        '<div class="ceo-card">' +
                        '<img class="ceo-logo" src="' +
                        logoSrc +
                        '" alt="MATSUYA GINZA" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\';if(this.nextElementSibling){this.nextElementSibling.style.display=\'block\';}" />' +
                        '<div class="ceo-logo-fallback" style="display:none">MATSUYA GINZA</div>' +
                        '<h1 class="ceo-title" id="ceo-title">' +
                        t.title +
                        '</h1>' +
                        '<p class="ceo-body">' +
                        t.body +
                        '</p>' +
                        '<button type="button" class="ceo-btn" onclick="window.location.reload()">' +
                        '<svg class="ceo-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-2.64-6.36"/><path d="M21 3v6h-6"/></svg>' +
                        '<span>' +
                        t.button +
                        '</span>' +
                        '</button>' +
                        '<p class="ceo-hint">' +
                        t.hint +
                        '</p>' +
                        '</div>';
                    (document.body || document.documentElement).appendChild(
                        overlay
                    );
                }

                function recover() {
                    if (isReloading) return;
                    // If the user is offline skip fetching the scripts that failed to load
                    if (!navigator.onLine) return;
                    isReloading = true;
                    if (shouldRetry()) {
                        clearCachesAndReload();
                    } else {
                        showErrorOverlay();
                    }
                }

                function isChunkError(msg) {
                    return (
                        msg.indexOf('Loading chunk') !== -1 ||
                        msg.indexOf(
                            'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module'
                        ) !== -1 ||
                        msg.indexOf('Importing a module script failed') !==
                            -1 ||
                        msg.indexOf(
                            'error loading dynamically imported module'
                        ) !== -1 ||
                        (msg.indexOf('Failed to fetch') !== -1 &&
                            msg.indexOf('.js') !== -1)
                    );
                }

                // Layer 1: Capture phase catches <script type="module"> load failures (404s)
                window.addEventListener(
                    'error',
                    function (e) {
                        if (
                            e.target &&
                            e.target.tagName === 'SCRIPT' &&
                            e.target.type === 'module'
                        ) {
                            recover();
                        }
                    },
                    true
                );

                // Layer 2: Bubble phase catches runtime chunk loading errors
                window.addEventListener('error', function (e) {
                    var err = e.error;
                    var msg = String((err && err.message) || err || '');
                    if (isChunkError(msg)) recover();
                });

                // Layer 3: Catches rejected dynamic import() calls
                window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', function (e) {
                    var err = e.reason;
                    var msg = String((err && err.message) || err || '');
                    if (isChunkError(msg)) recover();
                });

                // Reset retry counter on successful page load
                window.addEventListener('load', function () {
                    setTimeout(function () {
                        try {
                            sessionStorage.removeItem(RETRY_KEY);
                            sessionStorage.removeItem(RETRY_TS_KEY);
                        } catch (e) {
                            /* ignore */
                        }
                    }, 2000);
                });

                // Layer 4: Catches Vite's preload errors (Vite calls preventDefault
                // internally, which prevents the unhandledrejection listener from firing)
                window.addEventListener('vite:preloadError', function (e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    recover();
                });

                // Expose for external callers
                window.__chunkErrorRecover = recover;
            })();
        </script>

                    >

        </noscript>
    </body>
